trigger_event: finished goods are nearly ready to ship but a dispatch exception and customer-commitment risk remain unresolved
human_ask_examples: ????????????????????????? quality, delivery, ??? sales ????????? dispatch exception ??? customer risk
system_findings: dispatch exception is still open against the planned ship window
customer commitment risk is above the internal escalation threshold
shipment release depends on a human dispatch decision outside AI authority
recommended_actions: route dispatch exception for human decision
expected_outcome: AI summarizes shipment posture and customer-commitment risk, then stops at the human approval boundary before any shipment release or commitment change is made.
notes: Public-safe guided scenario for governed delivery review. Human delivery authority remains responsible for shipment release, customer-commitment changes, and export-control hold overrides.
